title: Allow mirror columns in Sequences

posts.author: nadya.shmidt (Nadya Shmidt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I keep Companies and Global Contact Book in separate boards that are connected via mirror columns, since companies may have many employees. I believe it is quite a common way of managing leads/companies/contacts.

It would really great if the Sequences could read mirror columns, since the emails are stored in another boards.

image786×336 17.8 KB
